01
The Artist
MEET
AASTHA

Aastha

Lead Artist & Founder — The GodQala, Vadodara

Aastha is the heart and hand of The GodQala. With a deep reverence for Indian spiritual art and a precise eye for detail, she has built Vadodara's most trusted name in premium custom tattooing.

From sacred mandalas and devotional portraits to whisper-fine line work and bold realism — every client who sits in her chair leaves with more than a tattoo. They leave with a piece of their soul made visible.

01

Rooted in Culture

Trishuls, mandalas, Sanskrit — honouring India's sacred artistic legacy.

02

Safety Always

Hospital-grade sterilization. Premium single-use equipment. Always.

03

Your Story, Our Craft

Every design is a collaboration — your meaning, Aastha's precision.

Follow @rajmaa_chaawal_

06
Know Before You Go
FAQ &
AFTERCARE
Does it hurt? +
Pain varies by placement. Most describe it as scratching or vibrating. Aastha works at a comfortable pace and checks in throughout.
How much does it cost? +
Small fine line pieces from ₹1,000. Large custom pieces and portraits from ₹3,000. You'll get an exact quote after sharing your idea.
How do I prepare? +
Eat a proper meal, stay hydrated, moisturise skin a few days before, and avoid alcohol 24 hours prior.
Can I bring my own design? +
Yes. Aastha will adapt it for skin — refining proportions, line weight, and placement so it heals beautifully.
Minimum age? +
18+. Valid government ID required. No exceptions.
Do you do cover-ups? +
Yes. Send a photo of the existing tattoo and your idea — Aastha will assess and design something you'll love.

AFTERCARE GUIDE

Day 1Keep wrap on 4–6 hrs. Wash gently with fragrance-free soap. Pat dry — never rub.
Day 2–7Apply thin unscented moisturiser 2–3× daily. Keep away from direct sunlight.
Week 2Let flaking happen. Never pick or peel. Tap gently if itchy — don't scratch.
Week 3–4Continue moisturising. Avoid pools and saunas until fully healed.
Month 1+Apply SPF 50 whenever in sun. This keeps the ink vibrant for years.
Questions? WhatsApp us →
